calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-06-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Appellant appears in Pro Per through Heather Hardcastle; Respondent Michael Page appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, present their cases in the narrative. No witnesses were present for either party. Judge Myles reviews respondents exhibits, previously marked as evidence in Small Claims. (Judge Myles does not request that respondents exhibits be re-marked for SCA purposes; Appellants new exhibits are marked.)
EXHA(1) Bill from Breaking Ground
EXHA(2) photos (collective)
EXHA(3) Letter of diagnosis
EXHA(4) emails (collective)
9:40am
The matter is submitted. Respondent's exhibits were returned, Appellant's SCA exhibits were marked and retained.
